name: Solstice Drift
summary: A trade corridor where derelict solar mirrors keep waking up at sunrise.

name: Umbra Veil
summary: A dust-thick sector where navigation AI reports phantom coastlines in empty space.

name: Verdant Rung
summary: A habitable ring seeded with algae towers and biotech monasteries.

name: Ember Null
summary: A collapsed mining zone that still radiates distress beacons from ships long recycled.
